briefing: Happy Friday, March 20th! Markets are bracing for Triple Witching volatility. The KOSPI closed at 5763.22 yesterday, down 2.73% amid geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz. Semiconductor stocks (Intel/Amazon) remain key focus areas. On the art scene, 'Spectrosynthesis Seoul' opens at Art Sonje Center today, alongside the ongoing '20!2026 Art Seoul' exhibition.
